featureDefs.name: Portfoy yonetimi
featureDefs.desc: Mulk karti, sahibi ve yetki sozlesmesi takibi; portfoy durumu tek kayitta. s-property uzerine.

featureDefs.name: Portal ilan senkronu
featureDefs.desc: Connector deseniyle ilan portallarina (sahibinden benzeri) yayin; durum geri senkronu.

featureDefs.name: Alici talep eslestirme
featureDefs.desc: Talep kaydi ve portfoy-talep eslestirme pipeline'i; uygun mulk otomatik onerilir. s-crm uzerine.

featureDefs.name: Komisyon paylasimi
featureDefs.desc: Paylasim oranlari, tahsilat ve danisman hakedisi; money/audit ile. stack-accounting uzerine.

integration.shouldIntegrate: Evet — aday distribution (sektor paketi); Stack subset Edition subset Distribution, gelismis UI/UX katmaniyla teslim.
integration.kernel: Authz (ofis/danisman capability), tenancy (ofis verisi RLS), event-bus (ilan/talep/komisyon event'leri).
integration.core: Portfoy/talep/komisyon Contract semasi; otomatik audit + bitemporal.
integration.modules: s-property (portfoy), s-classifieds (ilan + portal connector), s-crm (talep pipeline), stack-accounting (komisyon).
integration.apps: Emlak Ofisi App'i; danisman performans raporu hazir gelir.

moduleUsage: dist-realestate: Yetki sozlesmesi alinan mulk portfoye girer -> ilan portala senkronlanir -> gelen talep CRM pipeline'inda eslestirme alir -> satista komisyon stack-accounting'te money kaydi + danisman hakedisi audit ile islenir.
ecaExample:
trigger:
  event: realestate.deal.closed
condition:
  all:
    - actor.capability >= "realestate:close"
    - listing.authorized
    - not loop_detected
action:
  - emit: accounting.commission.posted
  - emit: realestate.listing.delisted
guards:
  max_depth: 6
  idempotency_key: "deal:{deal_id}"
  external_effects: step_up_required
securityNotes: Komisyon money kapsaminda: posting deny-by-default, capability realestate:close + audit gerekceli; mutabakat bitemporal.
Mulk sahibi/alici verisi pii: ofis tenant'i RLS ile izole; danisman yalniz yetkili portfoyu gorur.
Portal connector kimlik bilgisi secret; dis portal yaniti untrusted, senkronda dogrulanir.

perfNotes.code: Portfoy-talep eslestirme keyset ile sayfalanir; portal senkronu connector kotasi bilincli, hata halinde retry.
perfNotes.perf: Ilan senkronu asenkron event; danisman performans raporu onceden hesaplanir, sorgu aninda agir join yok.

testNotes: realestate:close olmayan aktor komisyon postlama -> deny.
Ayni deal_id ikinci kapanis -> cift komisyon olmamali (idempotency).
